name: launchdarkly-autofactory
description: Phase 1 of LaunchDarkly AutoFactory, in the editor: research a change, create a feature flag, instrument guarded-release metrics, and write flag-path tests.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run build && npm run bundle

launchdarkly-autofactory.ldProjectKey.markdownDescription: Factory/control-plane LaunchDarkly project key (holds the agent graph and AI configs).

launchdarkly-autofactory.ldAppProjectKey.markdownDescription: App/data-plane LaunchDarkly project key where flags and metrics are created.

launchdarkly-autofactory.graphKey.description: Agent graph key to resolve from LaunchDarkly and walk.

launchdarkly-autofactory.baseBranch.description: Branch the current change set is diffed against (the agents' git_diff base).

markdownEnumDescriptions: Report the reviewer's verdict; never gate (edits are already in your working tree).
Surface a stronger warning when the reviewer flags high risk.
Always present the verdict as requiring your review before committing.
launchdarkly-autofactory.approvalMode.description: How the reviewer's verdict is surfaced. The extension never commits for you, so this is advisory.

launchdarkly-autofactory.enableFlagCreat.description: Allow the agents to create real flags/metrics in the app project. Turn off for a read-only dry run.

launchdarkly-autofactory.enableCodeChang.description: Allow the agents to edit files in your working tree (flag wiring, instrumentation, tests). Edits are left uncommitted for your review.

markdownEnumDescriptions: Only run when you click the button or invoke the command.
When you commit on a non-base branch, offer to run via a notification.
When you commit on a non-base branch, run automatically.
launchdarkly-autofactory.autoRun.description: Automatic execution on new commits to a feature branch.
